---
title: "teacup viewBox fixture"
format: html
filters:
  - teacup
teacup:
  cache: _fixture-cache
  preamble: \usetikzlibrary{matrix}
---

A `matrix of math nodes` makes dvisvgm 3.0.x inflate the viewBox ~40%
rightward (mirror-transform text specials). The TeX box metrics say this
picture is 75.58pt wide; dvisvgm claims 106.89pt. (Regression check for the
savebox-based dimension fix.)

```{.tikz}
\matrix (m) [matrix of math nodes,column sep=4em]
{ A & B \\};
```
